corpus.label: my_new_corpus
corpus.source: dataset identifier, DOI, URL, or local/private description

status_tiers.submitted: PR opened or generated entry supplied; not yet validated.
status_tiers.artifact_validated: Schema, artifact hash, canonical settings, and declared provenance pass checks.
status_tiers.agent_reviewed: Maintainer or reviewing agent checked provenance and interpretation language.
status_tiers.reproduced: Maintainer or trusted runner reran the public metric suite and reproduced the submitted summaries within release tolerance.

score_interpretation: Scorecard values are diagnostic positions under the metric suite, not quality rankings or claims of downstream model behavior.
